src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:function ShowcaseManager() {

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const executeDeleteShowcaseItem = async () => {

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const compressAndUploadImage = async (file: File): Promise<string> => {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      reader.readAsDataURL(file);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      reader.onload = (event) => {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        const img = new Image();
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        img.src = event.target?.result as string;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        img.onload = async () => {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          const canvas = document.createElement("canvas");
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          const MAX_WIDTH = 500;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          const scaleSize = MAX_WIDTH / img.width;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          canvas.width = MAX_WIDTH;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          canvas.height = img.height * scaleSize;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          ctx?.drawImage(img, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          // Return Base64 string directly
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          const base64String = canvas.toDataURL("image/jpeg", 0.7);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          resolve(base64String);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        };
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        img.onerror = (error) => reject(error);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      };
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      reader.onerror = (error) => reject(error);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    });

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:function DeleteHistory() {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [history, setHistory] = useState<any[]>([]);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [page, setPage] = useState(0);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(false);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState("");
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState("");
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const [selectedHistory, setSelectedHistory] = useState<any>(null);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  const fetchHistory = async (reset = true) => {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    if (reset) {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      setLoading(true);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      setPage(0);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    }
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    const offset = reset ? 0 : (page + 1) * 50;
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    const params = new URLSearchParams();
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    params.append("limit", "50");
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    params.append("offset", offset.toString());
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    if (startDate) params.append("start_date", startDate);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    if (endDate) params.append("end_date", endDate);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    try {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/delete-history?${params}`);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      const data = await res.json();
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      if (reset) setHistory(data.data);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      else {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        setHistory(prev => [...prev, ...data.data]);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        setPage(p => p + 1);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      }
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      setHasMore(data.hasMore);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      setTotal(data.total);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    } catch (err) {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      console.error(err);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    } finally {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:      setLoading(false);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    }
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  };
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    fetchHistory();
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  }, [startDate, endDate]);
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    }
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  };
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:  return (
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:    <div className="space-y-6 animate-in fade-in">

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        <div>
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          <h3 className="text-3xl font-black text-slate-900">ডিলিট হিস্টোরি</h3>
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          <p className="text-slate-500 font-bold mt-1">সিস্টেম থেকে ডিলিট করা সকল রেকর্ডের তালিকা (মোট: {total})</p>

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:          <input 
src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:            type="date"

src/components/AdminPanel.tsx:            onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)}

src/components/LandingPage.tsx:function TypingTitle({ text }: { text: string }) {
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:  const [filledLength, setFilledLength] = useState(0);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:  useEffect(() => {
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:    if (!text) return;
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:    
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:    setFilledLength(0);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:    
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:    const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:      let i = 0;
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:      const interval = setInterval(() => {
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:        if (i <= text.length) {
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:          setFilledLength(i);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:          
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:          try {
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:            const AudioContext = window.AudioContext || (window as any).webkitAudioContext;
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:            if (AudioContext && i > 0 && i < text.length && text[i-1] !== ' ') {
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:              const ctx = new AudioContext();
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:              const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:              const gain = ctx.createGain();
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:              osc.connect(gain);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:              gain.connect(ctx.destination);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:              osc.type = 'sine';
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:              osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(600 + Math.random() * 200, ctx.currentTime);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:              gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.02, ctx.currentTime);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:              gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, ctx.currentTime + 0.03);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:              osc.start(ctx.currentTime);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:              osc.stop(ctx.currentTime + 0.03);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:            }
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:          } catch (e) {
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:            // Ignore audio errors
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:          }
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:          
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:          i++;
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:        } else {
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:          clearInterval(interval);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:        }
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:      }, 120); // Typing speed
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:      return () => clearInterval(interval);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:    }, 500);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:    
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:    return () => clearTimeout(timeout);
src/components/LandingPage.tsx:  }, [text]);

src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:export async function initFirebaseBackup() {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  const projectId = process.env.FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID;
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  const clientEmail = process.env.FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL;

src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  if (!projectId || !clientEmail || !privateKey) {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    console.log("Firebase credentials missing. Skipping cloud backup.");
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    return;
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  }
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  try {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    if (!admin.apps.length) {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:      admin.initializeApp({
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        credential: admin.credential.cert({
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:          projectId,
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:          clientEmail,
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:          privateKey: privateKey.replace(/\\n/g, '\n'),
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        }),
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        storageBucket: `${projectId}.appspot.com`
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:      });
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    }
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    const bucket = admin.storage().bucket();
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    // Check if bucket exists
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    const [metadata] = await bucket.getMetadata().catch(() => [null]);
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    if (!metadata) {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:      console.error("Firebase Storage bucket does not exist. Disabling cloud backup.");
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:      return;
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    }
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    const file = bucket.file('backup/madrasa.db');
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    const [exists] = await file.exists();
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    if (exists) {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:      console.log("Downloading database backup from Firebase...");
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:      await file.download({ destination: dbPath });
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:      console.log("Database restored successfully from Firebase Storage.");
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    } else {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:      console.log("No existing backup found in Firebase. Starting fresh.");
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    }
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  } catch (error) {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    console.error("Firebase initialization/restore failed:", error);
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  }
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:}
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:let backupTimeout: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:export function scheduleBackup() {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  if (!admin.apps.length) return;
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  if (backupTimeout) clearTimeout(backupTimeout);
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  backupTimeout = setTimeout(async () => {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    try {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:      if (fs.existsSync(dbPath)) {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        const bucket = admin.storage().bucket();
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        // Check if bucket exists
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        const [metadata] = await bucket.getMetadata().catch(() => [null]);
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        if (!metadata) {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:          console.error("Firebase Storage bucket does not exist. Skipping backup.");
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:          return;
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        }
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        await bucket.upload(dbPath, {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:          destination: 'backup/madrasa.db',
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:          metadata: { contentType: 'application/x-sqlite3' }
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        });
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:        console.log("Database successfully backed up to Firebase.");
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:      }
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    } catch (error: any) {
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:      console.error("Failed to backup database to Firebase:", error.message || error);
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:    }
src/lib/firebaseBackup.ts:  }, 5000); // 5 seconds debounce after the last write

src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:export const generateMonthlyReceipt = (data: any, student: any, sendEmail: any, addToast: any) => {
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    const doc = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', 'a5');
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    const pageWidth = doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    const margin = 15;
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setFillColor(6, 78, 59);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.rect(0, 0, pageWidth, 30, "F");
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setTextColor(255, 255, 255);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setFontSize(18);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text("AL HERA MADRASA", pageWidth / 2, 18, { align: "center" });
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setFontSize(8);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text("Monthly Fee Receipt", pageWidth / 2, 24, { align: "center" });
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setTextColor(0, 0, 0);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setFontSize(10);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text(`Receipt No: ${data.transaction_id}`, margin, 45);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text(`Date: ${new Date(data.paid_date).toLocaleDateString()}`, pageWidth - margin, 45, { align: "right" });
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setFontSize(12);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text("Student Information", margin, 58);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setFontSize(9);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text(`Name: ${student.name}`, margin, 66);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text(`ID: ${student.id}`, margin, 71);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text(`Class: ${student.class}`, margin, 76);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text(`Roll: ${student.roll}`, margin, 81);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    (doc as any).autoTable({
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:      startY: 90,
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:      margin: { left: margin, right: margin },
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:      head: [["Category", "Months", "Year", "Amount"]],
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:      body: [
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:        ["Monthly Fee", data.months.join(", "), data.year, `BDT ${data.amount}`]
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:      ],
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:      theme: "striped",
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:      headStyles: { fillColor: [6, 78, 59] },
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:      styles: { fontSize: 8 }
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    });
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    const finalY = (doc as any).lastAutoTable.finalY + 15;
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setFontSize(10);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text("Total Paid:", pageWidth - margin - 40, finalY);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setFontSize(12);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text(`BDT ${data.amount}.00`, pageWidth - margin, finalY, { align: "right" });
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setFontSize(7);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.setTextColor(150, 150, 150);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    doc.text("This is a computer-generated receipt. No signature required.", pageWidth / 2, 190, { align: "center" });
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    const pdfData = doc.output('datauristring');
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:    const filename = `Receipt_${student.id}_${data.transaction_id}.pdf`;

src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:export const generateResultPDF = async (elementId: string) => {
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:  const element = document.getElementById(elementId);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:  if (!element) return null;
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:  const canvas = await html2canvas(element);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:  const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/png');
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:  const pdf = new jsPDF('p', 'mm', 'a4');
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:  const imgProps = pdf.getImageProperties(imgData);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:  const pdfWidth = pdf.internal.pageSize.getWidth();
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:  const pdfHeight = (imgProps.height * pdfWidth) / imgProps.width;
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:  pdf.addImage(imgData, 'PNG', 0, 0, pdfWidth, pdfHeight);
src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts:  return pdf.output('datauristring');

copy_db.js:import Database from "better-sqlite3";
copy_db.js:try {
copy_db.js:  const db = new Database("madrasa.db");
copy_db.js:  const newDb = new Database("madrasa_new.db");
copy_db.js:
copy_db.js:  // Get all tables
copy_db.js:  const tables = db.prepare("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'").all();
copy_db.js:
copy_db.js:  for (const table of tables) {
copy_db.js:    if (table.name === "sqlite_sequence") continue;
copy_db.js:    console.log(`Copying table ${table.name}`);
copy_db.js:    try {
copy_db.js:      const rows = db.prepare(`SELECT * FROM ${table.name}`).all();
copy_db.js:      if (rows.length > 0) {
copy_db.js:        const columns = Object.keys(rows[0]);
copy_db.js:        const placeholders = columns.map(() => "?").join(",");
copy_db.js:        
copy_db.js:        // Create table in new DB
copy_db.js:        const createTable = db.prepare(`SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE name='${table.name}'`).get();
copy_db.js:        newDb.exec(createTable.sql);
copy_db.js:        
copy_db.js:        const insert = newDb.prepare(`INSERT INTO ${table.name} (${columns.map(c => `"${c}"`).join(",")}) VALUES (${placeholders})`);
copy_db.js:        for (const row of rows) {
copy_db.js:          insert.run(Object.values(row));
copy_db.js:        }
copy_db.js:      }
copy_db.js:    } catch (e) {
copy_db.js:      console.error(`Could not copy table ${table.name}:`, e.message);
copy_db.js:    }
copy_db.js:  }
copy_db.js:  console.log("Database copied successfully");
copy_db.js:} catch (e) {
copy_db.js:  console.error("Database error:", e.message);
copy_db.js:}

server.ts:  // --- Transactions ---
server.ts:  app.get("/api/admin/all-history", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const { start_date, end_date } = req.query;
server.ts:      let feesQuery: any = firestore!.collection("fees").where("status", "==", "paid");
server.ts:      let incomeQuery: any = firestore!.collection("income");
server.ts:      let expensesQuery: any = firestore!.collection("expenses");
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (start_date) {
server.ts:        feesQuery = feesQuery.where("paid_date", ">=", start_date);
server.ts:        incomeQuery = incomeQuery.where("date", ">=", start_date);
server.ts:        expensesQuery = expensesQuery.where("date", ">=", start_date);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      if (end_date) {
server.ts:        feesQuery = feesQuery.where("paid_date", "<=", end_date + "T23:59:59.999Z");
server.ts:        incomeQuery = incomeQuery.where("date", "<=", end_date + "T23:59:59.999Z");
server.ts:        expensesQuery = expensesQuery.where("date", "<=", end_date + "T23:59:59.999Z");
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const [feesSnap, incomeSnap, expensesSnap] = await Promise.all([
server.ts:        feesQuery.get(),
server.ts:        incomeQuery.get(),
server.ts:        expensesQuery.get()
server.ts:      ]);
server.ts:
server.ts:      const allData: any[] = [];
server.ts:
server.ts:      feesSnap.docs.forEach(doc => {
server.ts:        const data = doc.data();
server.ts:        allData.push({
server.ts:          id: doc.id,
server.ts:          type: 'fee',
server.ts:          date: data.paid_date,
server.ts:          amount: data.amount,
server.ts:          category: data.category,
server.ts:          student_name: data.student_name,
server.ts:          student_id: data.student_id,
server.ts:          transaction_id: data.transaction_id,
server.ts:          ...data
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      incomeSnap.docs.forEach(doc => {
server.ts:        const data = doc.data();
server.ts:        allData.push({
server.ts:          id: doc.id,
server.ts:          type: 'income',
server.ts:          date: data.paid_date || data.date,
server.ts:          amount: Number(data.amount),
server.ts:          category: data.category,
server.ts:          student_name: data.student_name || 'অন্যান্য',
server.ts:          student_id: data.student_id,
server.ts:          transaction_id: data.transaction_id || `INC-${doc.id.substring(0,6).toUpperCase()}`,
server.ts:          ...data
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      expensesSnap.docs.forEach(doc => {
server.ts:        const data = doc.data();
server.ts:        allData.push({
server.ts:          id: doc.id,
server.ts:          type: 'expense',
server.ts:          date: data.date,
server.ts:          amount: Number(data.amount),
server.ts:          category: data.category,
server.ts:          student_name: 'খরচ',
server.ts:          transaction_id: `EXP-${doc.id.substring(0,6).toUpperCase()}`,
server.ts:          ...data
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      allData.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date).getTime() - new Date(a.date).getTime());
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json(allData);
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error(error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch all history" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  app.delete("/api/admin/all-history/:type/:id", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { password } = req.body;
server.ts:    const adminPassword = process.env.VITE_ADMIN_PASSWORD || "1234";
server.ts:    if (password !== adminPassword && password !== "১২৩৪") {
server.ts:      return res.status(401).json({ error: "ভুল পাসওয়ার্ড!" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    const { type, id } = req.params;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      let collectionName = "";
server.ts:      if (type === "fee") collectionName = "fees";
server.ts:      else if (type === "income") collectionName = "income";
server.ts:      else if (type === "expense") collectionName = "expenses";
server.ts:      else return res.status(400).json({ error: "Invalid type" });
server.ts:
server.ts:      const docRef = firestore!.collection(collectionName).doc(id);
server.ts:      const docSnap = await docRef.get();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (docSnap.exists) {
server.ts:        await firestore!.collection("delete_history").add({
server.ts:          type: `history_${type}`,
server.ts:          details: JSON.stringify(docSnap.data()),
server.ts:          deleted_at: new Date().toISOString()
server.ts:        });
server.ts:
server.ts:        if (type === "fee") {
server.ts:          const feeData = docSnap.data();
server.ts:          if (feeData?.category === 'মাসিক বেতন') {
server.ts:            await docRef.delete();
server.ts:          } else {
server.ts:            await docRef.update({
server.ts:              status: 'unpaid',
server.ts:              paid_date: null,
server.ts:              transaction_id: null
server.ts:            });
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:          await docRef.delete();
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error(error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to delete history item" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.delete("/api/admin/transactions/:id", async (req, res) => {

server.ts:    if (password !== (process.env.VITE_ADMIN_PASSWORD || "1234") && password !== "১২৩৪") {

server.ts:  // --- Delete History ---
server.ts:  app.get("/api/admin/delete-history", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { limit = 50, offset = 0 } = req.query;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const snapshot = await firestore.collection("delete_history").orderBy("deleted_at", "desc").get();
server.ts:      const allHistory = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as any));
server.ts:      const total = allHistory.length;
server.ts:      const history = allHistory.slice(Number(offset), Number(offset) + Number(limit));
server.ts:      
server.ts:      res.json({
server.ts:        data: history,
server.ts:        total,
server.ts:        hasMore: Number(offset) + Number(limit) < total
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch delete history" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  // --- Fee Reports ---
server.ts:  app.get("/api/admin/fees/monthly-report", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { className, month } = req.query; // month format: 'YYYY-MM'
server.ts:    
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const studentsSnapshot = await firestore!.collection("students").where("class", "==", className).get();
server.ts:      const students = studentsSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const report = await Promise.all(students.map(async (student: any) => {
server.ts:        const feesSnapshot = await firestore!.collection("transactions")
server.ts:          .where("student_id", "==", student.id)
server.ts:          .where("paid_date", ">=", `${month}-01`)
server.ts:          .where("paid_date", "<=", `${month}-31`)
server.ts:          .get();
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const fee = feesSnapshot.docs[0]?.data();
server.ts:
server.ts:        return {
server.ts:          ...student,
server.ts:          status: fee ? 'paid' : 'unpaid',
server.ts:          amount: fee ? fee.amount : 0,
server.ts:          paid_date: fee ? fee.paid_date : null
server.ts:        };
server.ts:      }));
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json(report);
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error(error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to generate report" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/admin/fees/due-report", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { className } = req.query;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const studentsSnapshot = await firestore.collection("students").where("class", "==", className).where("deleted_at", "==", null).get();
server.ts:      const students = studentsSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const report = await Promise.all(students.map(async (student: any) => {
server.ts:        const feesSnapshot = await firestore.collection("fees")
server.ts:          .where("student_id", "==", student.id)
server.ts:          .where("status", "==", "unpaid")
server.ts:          .get();
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const dueFees = feesSnapshot.docs.map(doc => doc.data());
server.ts:        const totalDue = dueFees.reduce((sum: number, f: any) => sum + f.amount, 0);
server.ts:
server.ts:        return {
server.ts:          ...student,
server.ts:          totalDue,
server.ts:          dueMonths: dueFees.map((f: any) => f.due_date)
server.ts:        };
server.ts:      }));
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json(report.filter((s: any) => s.totalDue > 0));
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error(error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to generate due report" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  // --- Site Settings ---
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/site-settings", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    console.log("Fetching site settings...");
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const db = getFirestoreInstance();
server.ts:      if (!db) throw new Error("Firestore not initialized");
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Add a timeout to firestore call
server.ts:      const settingsPromise = db.collection("site_settings").doc("1").get();
server.ts:      const timeoutPromise = new Promise((_, reject) => 
server.ts:        setTimeout(() => reject(new Error("Firestore timeout")), 10000)
server.ts:      );
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const settingsDoc = await Promise.race([settingsPromise, timeoutPromise]) as admin.firestore.DocumentSnapshot;
server.ts:      
server.ts:      console.log("Site settings fetched successfully. Exists:", settingsDoc.exists);
server.ts:      res.json(settingsDoc.exists ? { id: settingsDoc.id, ...settingsDoc.data() } : {});
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("Error fetching site settings:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch settings", details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/site-settings", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { 
server.ts:      title, description, hero_image, logo_url, contact_phone, 
server.ts:      whatsapp_number, facebook_url, announcement, bkash_number, 
server.ts:      nagad_number, rocket_number, enable_bkash, enable_nagad, enable_rocket, enable_recruitment, address,
server.ts:      smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_user, smtp_pass, sender_email,
server.ts:      firebase_service_account,
server.ts:      show_features_directly, show_food_directly, show_showcase_directly, showcase_content,
server.ts:      admission_rules,
server.ts:      enable_neon_light, neon_light_color, neon_light_effect
server.ts:    } = req.body;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      await firestore!.collection("site_settings").doc("1").set({
server.ts:        title: title || "", description: description || "", hero_image: hero_image || "", logo_url: logo_url || "", contact_phone: contact_phone || "", 
server.ts:        whatsapp_number: whatsapp_number || "", facebook_url: facebook_url || "", announcement: announcement || "", bkash_number: bkash_number || "", 
server.ts:        nagad_number: nagad_number || "", rocket_number: rocket_number || "",
server.ts:        enable_bkash: enable_bkash ? 1 : 0, enable_nagad: enable_nagad ? 1 : 0, enable_rocket: enable_rocket ? 1 : 0,
server.ts:        enable_recruitment: enable_recruitment ? 1 : 0, address: address || "",
server.ts:        smtp_host: smtp_host || "", smtp_port: smtp_port || "", smtp_user: smtp_user || "", smtp_pass: smtp_pass || "", sender_email: sender_email || "",
server.ts:        firebase_service_account: firebase_service_account || "",
server.ts:        show_features_directly: show_features_directly ? 1 : 0, 
server.ts:        show_food_directly: show_food_directly ? 1 : 0, 
server.ts:        show_showcase_directly: show_showcase_directly ? 1 : 0, 
server.ts:        showcase_content: showcase_content || '[]',
server.ts:        admission_rules: admission_rules || "",
server.ts:        enable_neon_light: enable_neon_light ? 1 : 0,
server.ts:        neon_light_color: neon_light_color || "#10b981",
server.ts:        neon_light_effect: neon_light_effect || "pulse"
server.ts:      }, { merge: true });
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("Error updating site settings:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to update settings" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:        .filter(item => item.is_active === 1)
server.ts:        .sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date || 0).getTime() - new Date(a.date || 0).getTime());
server.ts:      res.json(foodMenu);

server.ts:  // --- Class Promotion ---
server.ts:  app.post("/api/admin/promote-class", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { password } = req.body;
server.ts:    if (password !== (process.env.VITE_ADMIN_PASSWORD || "1234") && password !== "১২৩৪") {
server.ts:      return res.status(401).json({ error: "Invalid password" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const classMap: {[key: string]: string} = {
server.ts:        "১ম": "২য়",
server.ts:        "২য়": "৩য়",
server.ts:        "৩য়": "৪র্থ",
server.ts:        "৪র্থ": "৫ম",
server.ts:        "৫ম": "৬ষ্ঠ",
server.ts:        "হিফজ": "হিফজ"
server.ts:      };
server.ts:
server.ts:      const studentsSnapshot = await firestore.collection("students").get();
server.ts:      const batch = firestore.batch();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      studentsSnapshot.docs.forEach(doc => {
server.ts:        const data = doc.data();
server.ts:        if (!data.deleted_at) {
server.ts:          const nextClass = classMap[data.class];
server.ts:          if (nextClass) {
server.ts:            batch.update(doc.ref, { class: nextClass });
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      });
server.ts:      
server.ts:      await batch.commit();
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (e) {
server.ts:      console.error(e);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to promote students" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:

server.ts:  app.get("/api/admin/teacher-attendance", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { date } = req.query;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const teachersSnapshot = await firestore.collection("teachers").get();
server.ts:      const teachers = teachersSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, name: doc.data().name }));
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const attendanceSnapshot = await firestore.collection("teacher_attendance").where("date", "==", date).get();
server.ts:      const attendance = attendanceSnapshot.docs.map(doc => doc.data());
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const result = teachers.map((t: any) => ({
server.ts:        ...t,
server.ts:        status: attendance.find((a: any) => a.teacher_id === t.id)?.status || null
server.ts:      }));
server.ts:      
server.ts:      res.json(result);
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch teacher attendance" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/admin/teacher-attendance/bulk", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { date, records } = req.body;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const batch = firestore.batch();
server.ts:      for (const record of records) {
server.ts:        const docRef = firestore.collection("teacher_attendance").doc(`${record.teacher_id}_${date}`);
server.ts:        if (record.status) {
server.ts:          batch.set(docRef, { teacher_id: record.teacher_id, date, status: record.status });
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:          batch.delete(docRef);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      await batch.commit();
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to save teacher attendance" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.delete("/api/admin/teachers/:id", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { password } = req.body;
server.ts:    if (password !== (process.env.VITE_ADMIN_PASSWORD || "1234") && password !== "১২৩৪") {
server.ts:      return res.status(401).json({ error: "ভুল পাসওয়ার্ড!" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const teacherDoc = await firestore.collection("teachers").doc(req.params.id).get();
server.ts:      if (teacherDoc.exists) {
server.ts:        await firestore.collection("delete_history").add({
server.ts:          type: 'teacher',
server.ts:          details: JSON.stringify({ id: teacherDoc.id, ...teacherDoc.data() }),
server.ts:          deleted_at: new Date().toISOString()
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        await firestore.collection("teachers").doc(req.params.id).delete();
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (e) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to delete teacher" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.delete("/api/admin/teachers/salary/:id", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { password } = req.body;
server.ts:    if (password !== (process.env.VITE_ADMIN_PASSWORD || "1234") && password !== "১২৩৪") {
server.ts:      return res.status(401).json({ error: "ভুল পাসওয়ার্ড!" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const salaryDoc = await firestore.collection("teacher_salaries").doc(req.params.id).get();
server.ts:      if (salaryDoc.exists) {
server.ts:        await firestore.collection("delete_history").add({
server.ts:          type: 'teacher_salary',
server.ts:          details: JSON.stringify({ id: salaryDoc.id, ...salaryDoc.data() }),
server.ts:          deleted_at: new Date().toISOString()
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        await firestore.collection("teacher_salaries").doc(req.params.id).delete();
server.ts:      }

server.ts:  app.put("/api/admin/teachers/salary/:id", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { amount, given_by, month, year } = req.body;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const salaryDoc = await firestore.collection("teacher_salaries").doc(req.params.id).get();
server.ts:      if (!salaryDoc.exists) return res.status(404).json({ error: "Salary not found" });
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const oldData = salaryDoc.data();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const updateData: any = {
server.ts:        amount: Number(amount),
server.ts:        given_by: given_by || null,
server.ts:        month,
server.ts:        year: Number(year),
server.ts:        is_edited: true,
server.ts:        edit_history: [
server.ts:          ...(oldData?.edit_history || []),
server.ts:          {
server.ts:            edited_at: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:            changes: `Amount: ${oldData?.amount} -> ${amount}, Month: ${oldData?.month} -> ${month}, Year: ${oldData?.year} -> ${year}, Given By: ${oldData?.given_by} -> ${given_by}`
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        ]
server.ts:      };
server.ts:
server.ts:      await firestore.collection("teacher_salaries").doc(req.params.id).update(updateData);
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("Failed to update salary:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to update salary" });

server.ts:  app.get("/api/admin/accounting/summary", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { start_date, end_date } = req.query;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      let feesQuery: any = firestore.collection("fees");
server.ts:      let incomeQuery: any = firestore.collection("income");
server.ts:      let expenseQuery: any = firestore.collection("expenses");
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (start_date && end_date) {
server.ts:        feesQuery = feesQuery.where("paid_date", ">=", start_date).where("paid_date", "<=", end_date);
server.ts:        incomeQuery = incomeQuery.where("date", ">=", start_date).where("date", "<=", end_date);
server.ts:        expenseQuery = expenseQuery.where("date", ">=", start_date).where("date", "<=", end_date);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const [feesSnapshot, incomeSnapshot, expenseSnapshot] = await Promise.all([
server.ts:        feesQuery.get(),
server.ts:        incomeQuery.get(),
server.ts:        expenseQuery.get()
server.ts:      ]);
server.ts:
server.ts:      const feeIncome = feesSnapshot.docs
server.ts:        .filter(doc => doc.data().status === "paid")
server.ts:        .reduce((sum, doc) => sum + (doc.data().amount || 0), 0);
server.ts:      const otherIncome = incomeSnapshot.docs.reduce((sum, doc) => sum + (doc.data().amount || 0), 0);
server.ts:      const totalIncome = feeIncome + otherIncome;
server.ts:      const totalExpense = expenseSnapshot.docs.reduce((sum, doc) => sum + (doc.data().amount || 0), 0);
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({ 
server.ts:        totalIncome, 
server.ts:        feeIncome,
server.ts:        otherIncome,
server.ts:        totalExpense, 
server.ts:        balance: totalIncome - totalExpense 
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch summary" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/admin/accounting/income", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { start_date, end_date, limit = 50, offset = 0, search } = req.query;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      let feesQuery: any = firestore.collection("fees");
server.ts:      let incomeQuery: any = firestore.collection("income");
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (start_date && end_date) {
server.ts:        feesQuery = feesQuery.where("paid_date", ">=", start_date).where("paid_date", "<=", end_date);
server.ts:        incomeQuery = incomeQuery.where("date", ">=", start_date).where("date", "<=", end_date);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const [feesSnapshot, incomeSnapshot] = await Promise.all([
server.ts:        feesQuery.get(),
server.ts:        incomeQuery.get()
server.ts:      ]);
server.ts:
server.ts:      const feeIncome = feesSnapshot.docs
server.ts:        .filter(doc => doc.data().status === "paid")
server.ts:        .map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data(), type: 'Fee' } as any));
server.ts:      const otherIncome = incomeSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data(), type: 'Other' } as any));
server.ts:
server.ts:      let allIncome = [...feeIncome, ...otherIncome];
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (search) {
server.ts:        const s = (search as string).toLowerCase();
server.ts:        allIncome = allIncome.filter(item => 
server.ts:          (item.category && item.category.toLowerCase().includes(s)) ||
server.ts:          (item.student_name && item.student_name.toLowerCase().includes(s)) ||
server.ts:          item.id.toLowerCase().includes(s)
server.ts:        );
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      allIncome.sort((a, b) => {
server.ts:        const dateA = a.paid_date || a.date;
server.ts:        const dateB = b.paid_date || b.date;
server.ts:        return new Date(dateB).getTime() - new Date(dateA).getTime();
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      const paginatedIncome = allIncome.slice(Number(offset), Number(offset) + Number(limit));
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({
server.ts:        data: paginatedIncome,
server.ts:        total: allIncome.length,
server.ts:        hasMore: Number(offset) + Number(limit) < allIncome.length
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch income" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:

server.ts:  app.post("/api/admin/fees/bulk-create", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { name, amount, classAmounts, className } = req.body;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      let studentsQuery = firestore.collection("students").where("deleted_at", "==", null);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (className && className !== "All") {
server.ts:        studentsQuery = studentsQuery.where("class", "==", className);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const studentsSnapshot = await studentsQuery.get();
server.ts:      const students = studentsSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const batch = firestore.batch();
server.ts:      const setupRef = firestore.collection("fee_setups").doc();
server.ts:      batch.set(setupRef, {
server.ts:        name,
server.ts:        type: 'exam',
server.ts:        className,
server.ts:        amount: Number(amount),
server.ts:        month: null,
server.ts:        created_at: new Date().toISOString()
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      for (const student of students as any[]) {
server.ts:        let feeAmount = amount;
server.ts:        if (classAmounts && classAmounts[student.class]) {
server.ts:          feeAmount = Number(classAmounts[student.class]);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const category = name;
server.ts:        const feeRef = firestore.collection("fees").doc();
server.ts:        batch.set(feeRef, {
server.ts:          student_id: student.id,
server.ts:          category,
server.ts:          amount: Number(feeAmount),
server.ts:          due_date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
server.ts:          status: 'unpaid',
server.ts:          setup_id: setupRef.id,
server.ts:          created_at: new Date().toISOString()
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      await batch.commit();
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, count: students.length });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("Bulk fee creation error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to create fees" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  app.delete("/api/admin/fee-setups/:id", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { password } = req.body;
server.ts:    if (password !== (process.env.VITE_ADMIN_PASSWORD || "1234") && password !== "১২৩৪") return res.status(403).json({ error: "ভুল পাসওয়ার্ড" });
server.ts:
server.ts:    const setupId = req.params.id;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const setupDoc = await firestore.collection("fee_setups").doc(setupId).get();
server.ts:      if (!setupDoc.exists) return res.status(404).json({ error: "Setup not found" });
server.ts:      const setup = setupDoc.data();
server.ts:
server.ts:      const batch = firestore.batch();
server.ts:      batch.set(firestore.collection("delete_history").doc(), {
server.ts:        type: 'fee_setup',
server.ts:        details: JSON.stringify({ id: setupId, ...setup }),
server.ts:        deleted_at: new Date().toISOString()
server.ts:      });
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const feesSnapshot = await firestore.collection("fees").where("setup_id", "==", setupId).get();
server.ts:      feesSnapshot.docs.forEach(doc => batch.delete(doc.ref));
server.ts:      batch.delete(setupDoc.ref);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      await batch.commit();
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error(error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to delete fee setup" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/admin/fees/search", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { search, className } = req.query;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const feesSnapshot = await firestore.collection("fees").where("status", "==", "unpaid").get();
server.ts:      const fees = feesSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as any));
server.ts:
server.ts:      const studentsSnapshot = await firestore.collection("students").get();
server.ts:      const students = studentsSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as any));
server.ts:
server.ts:      let results = fees.map(fee => {
server.ts:        const student = students.find(s => s.id === fee.student_id);
server.ts:        if (!student) return null;
server.ts:        return {
server.ts:          ...student,
server.ts:          fee_id: fee.id,
server.ts:          category: fee.category,
server.ts:          amount: fee.amount,
server.ts:          due_date: fee.due_date,
server.ts:          status: fee.status
server.ts:        };
server.ts:      }).filter(r => r !== null) as any[];
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (className && className !== "All") {
server.ts:        results = results.filter(r => r.class === className);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (search) {
server.ts:        const s = (search as string).toLowerCase();
server.ts:        results = results.filter(r => 
server.ts:          (r.name && r.name.toLowerCase().includes(s)) ||
server.ts:          (r.id && r.id.toLowerCase().includes(s)) ||
server.ts:          (r.roll && r.roll.toString().includes(s))
server.ts:        );
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      results.sort((a, b) => {
server.ts:        if (a.class !== b.class) return (a.class || "").localeCompare(b.class || "");
server.ts:        if (a.roll !== b.roll) return (Number(a.roll) || 0) - (Number(b.roll) || 0);
server.ts:        return new Date(a.due_date).getTime() - new Date(b.due_date).getTime();
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      const grouped: any = {};
server.ts:      results.forEach((row: any) => {
server.ts:        if (!grouped[row.id]) {
server.ts:          grouped[row.id] = {
server.ts:            id: row.id,
server.ts:            name: row.name,
server.ts:            roll: row.roll,
server.ts:            class: row.class,
server.ts:            photo_url: row.photo_url,
server.ts:            fees: []
server.ts:          };
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        grouped[row.id].fees.push({
server.ts:          id: row.fee_id,
server.ts:          category: row.category,
server.ts:          amount: row.amount,
server.ts:          due_date: row.due_date
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json(Object.values(grouped));
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error(error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to search fees" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/admin/fees/pay", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { fee_ids, paid_amounts, discount, total_paid, payment_method } = req.body;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const batch = firestore.batch();
server.ts:      const transactionId = `TRX-${Date.now()}`;
server.ts:      
server.ts:      for (const id of fee_ids) {
server.ts:        const amount = paid_amounts[id];
server.ts:        const feeRef = firestore.collection("fees").doc(id);
server.ts:        const updateData: any = {
server.ts:          status: 'paid',
server.ts:          paid_date: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:          transaction_id: transactionId,
server.ts:          payment_method: payment_method || "cash",
server.ts:          discount_applied: (discount || 0) / fee_ids.length
server.ts:        };
server.ts:        if (amount) {
server.ts:          updateData.paid_amount = Number(amount);
server.ts:        }
server.ts:        batch.update(feeRef, updateData);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      await batch.commit();
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("Fee payment error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to process payment" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  app.get("/api/students", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { className, search, limit, offset, include_deleted } = req.query;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      let query: any = firestore.collection("students");
server.ts:      if (include_deleted !== 'true') {
server.ts:        query = query.where("deleted_at", "==", null);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      if (className && className !== "All") {
server.ts:        query = query.where("class", "==", className);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      const snapshot = await query.get();
server.ts:      let students = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as any));
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (search) {
server.ts:        const s = (search as string).toLowerCase();
server.ts:        students = students.filter(student => 
server.ts:          (student.name && student.name.toLowerCase().includes(s)) ||
server.ts:          (student.id && student.id.toLowerCase().includes(s)) ||
server.ts:          (student.roll && student.roll.toString().includes(s))
server.ts:        );
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      students.sort((a, b) => {
server.ts:        if (a.class !== b.class) return (a.class || "").localeCompare(b.class || "");
server.ts:        return (Number(a.roll) || 0) - (Number(b.roll) || 0);
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (limit) {
server.ts:        const l = parseInt(limit as string);
server.ts:        const o = offset ? parseInt(offset as string) : 0;
server.ts:        students = students.slice(o, o + l);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json(students);
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch students" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/students/:id", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const doc = await firestore.collection("students").doc(req.params.id).get();
server.ts:      if (!doc.exists || doc.data()?.deleted_at) {
server.ts:        return res.status(404).json({ error: "Student not found" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      res.json({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch student" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/students/:id/full-profile", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const studentId = req.params.id;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const studentDoc = await firestore.collection("students").doc(studentId).get();
server.ts:      if (!studentDoc.exists) {
server.ts:        return res.status(404).json({ error: "Student not found" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      const student = { id: studentDoc.id, ...studentDoc.data() } as any;
server.ts:
server.ts:      const feesSnapshot = await firestore.collection("fees").where("student_id", "==", studentId).get();
server.ts:      const fees = feesSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as any));
server.ts:
server.ts:      const attendanceSnapshot = await firestore.collection("attendance").where("student_id", "==", studentId).get();
server.ts:      const attendance = attendanceSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as any));
server.ts:
server.ts:      const resultsSnapshot = await firestore.collection("results").where("student_id", "==", studentId).get();
server.ts:      const results = resultsSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as any));
server.ts:
server.ts:      const hifzSnapshot = await firestore.collection("hifz_records").where("student_id", "==", studentId).get();
server.ts:      const hifz = hifzSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as any));
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Calculate Rank
server.ts:      let examStats: any = {};
server.ts:      try {
server.ts:        const exams = [...new Set(results.map((r: any) => r.exam_name))];
server.ts:        for (const exam of (exams as string[])) {
server.ts:          const classStudentsSnapshot = await firestore.collection("students").where("class", "==", student.class).where("deleted_at", "==", null).get();
server.ts:          const classStudentIds = classStudentsSnapshot.docs.map(s => s.id);
server.ts:
server.ts:          const allExamResultsSnapshot = await firestore.collection("results").where("exam_name", "==", exam).get();
server.ts:          const allExamResults = allExamResultsSnapshot.docs.map(doc => doc.data() as any).filter(r => classStudentIds.includes(r.student_id));
server.ts:
server.ts:          const studentTotals: any = {};
server.ts:          allExamResults.forEach(r => {
server.ts:            studentTotals[r.student_id] = (studentTotals[r.student_id] || 0) + r.marks;
server.ts:          });
server.ts:
server.ts:          const sortedTotals = Object.entries(studentTotals).map(([id, total]) => ({ student_id: id, total })).sort((a: any, b: any) => b.total - a.total);
server.ts:
server.ts:          const myRankIndex = sortedTotals.findIndex(m => m.student_id === studentId);
server.ts:          const myTotal = studentTotals[studentId] || 0;
server.ts:          const highest = sortedTotals.length > 0 ? sortedTotals[0].total : 0;
server.ts:
server.ts:          examStats[exam] = {
server.ts:            rank: myRankIndex !== -1 ? myRankIndex + 1 : '-',
server.ts:            totalStudents: sortedTotals.length,
server.ts:            highestMarks: highest,
server.ts:            myTotal: myTotal
server.ts:          };
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      } catch (e) {
server.ts:        console.error("Rank calculation error:", e);
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({
server.ts:        student,
server.ts:        fees,
server.ts:        attendance,
server.ts:        results,
server.ts:        hifz,
server.ts:        examStats
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error(error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch full profile" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/admin/students", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { name, father_name, mother_name, dob, blood_group, address, phone, whatsapp, email, className, is_hifz, photo_url, roll: providedRoll, monthly_fee, studentId: providedStudentId } = req.body;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    if (!name || !className) {
server.ts:      return res.status(400).json({ error: "নাম এবং শ্রেণী আবশ্যক" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      let roll = providedRoll;
server.ts:      if (!roll) {
server.ts:        const studentCountSnapshot = await firestore.collection("students").where("class", "==", className).get();
server.ts:        roll = (studentCountSnapshot.size + 1).toString().padStart(3, '0');
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      let studentId = providedStudentId;
server.ts:      if (!studentId) {
server.ts:        const classMap: { [key: string]: string } = {
server.ts:          "১ম": "1", "২য়": "2", "৩য়": "3", "৪র্থ": "4", "৫ম": "5", "হিফজ": "Hifz"
server.ts:        };
server.ts:        const classNumeric = classMap[className] || className;
server.ts:        studentId = `AHM-${classNumeric}-${roll}`;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      let studentCode = "";
server.ts:      const lastStudentSnapshot = await firestore.collection("students").where("student_code", ">=", "AH").orderBy("student_code", "desc").limit(1).get();
server.ts:      if (!lastStudentSnapshot.empty) {
server.ts:        const lastStudent = lastStudentSnapshot.docs[0].data();
server.ts:        const lastNum = parseInt(lastStudent.student_code.replace('AH', ''));
server.ts:        studentCode = `AH${(lastNum + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0')}`;
server.ts:      } else {
server.ts:        studentCode = "AH01";
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const existingDoc = await firestore.collection("students").doc(studentId).get();
server.ts:      if (existingDoc.exists) {
server.ts:        return res.status(400).json({ error: `এই আইডি (${studentId}) ইতিমধ্যে ব্যবহৃত হয়েছে। অনুগ্রহ করে অন্য আইডি চেষ্টা করুন।` });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const studentData = {
server.ts:        roll,
server.ts:        name,
server.ts:        father_name,
server.ts:        mother_name,
server.ts:        dob,
server.ts:        blood_group,
server.ts:        address,
server.ts:        phone,
server.ts:        whatsapp,
server.ts:        email,
server.ts:        class: className,
server.ts:        is_hifz: (is_hifz || className === "হিফজ") ? 1 : 0,
server.ts:        photo_url,
server.ts:        monthly_fee: monthly_fee || 0,
server.ts:        student_code: studentCode,
server.ts:        deleted_at: null,
server.ts:        created_at: new Date().toISOString()
server.ts:      };
server.ts:
server.ts:      await firestore.collection("students").doc(studentId).set(studentData);
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, studentId, roll, studentCode });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("Student creation error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "ছাত্র যুক্ত করা সম্ভব হয়নি। ডাটাবেস এরর।" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:    const { id, action } = req.body;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      if (action === 'reject') {
server.ts:        await firestore.collection("admissions").doc(id).update({ status: 'rejected' });
server.ts:        return res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const applicationDoc = await firestore.collection("admissions").doc(id).get();
server.ts:      const application = applicationDoc.data();
server.ts:      if (!application) return res.status(404).json({ error: "Application not found" });
server.ts:
server.ts:      const className = application.class;
server.ts:      const studentCountSnapshot = await firestore.collection("students").where("class", "==", className).get();
server.ts:      const roll = (studentCountSnapshot.size + 1).toString().padStart(3, '0');
server.ts:      const studentId = `AHM-${className}-${roll}`;
server.ts:      const studentCode = Math.floor(100000 + Math.random() * 900000).toString();
server.ts:
server.ts:      const studentData = {
server.ts:        roll,
server.ts:        name: application.name,
server.ts:        father_name: application.father_name,
server.ts:        mother_name: application.mother_name,
server.ts:        dob: application.dob,

server.ts:        email: application.email,
server.ts:        class: application.class,
server.ts:        is_hifz: application.is_hifz,
server.ts:        photo_url: application.photo_url,
server.ts:        student_code: studentCode,
server.ts:        deleted_at: null,
server.ts:        created_at: new Date().toISOString()
server.ts:      };
server.ts:
server.ts:      await firestore.collection("students").doc(studentId).set(studentData);
server.ts:      await firestore.collection("admissions").doc(id).update({ status: 'approved' });
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true, studentId, roll, studentCode });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {

server.ts:  app.post("/api/pay-monthly-fees", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { student_id, student_name, year, months, total_amount, discount, transaction_id } = req.body;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const batch = firestore.batch();
server.ts:      const paid_date = new Date().toISOString();
server.ts:      const amount_per_month = Math.round((total_amount + (discount || 0)) / months.length);
server.ts:      const paid_amount_per_month = Math.round(total_amount / months.length);
server.ts:      const discount_per_month = Math.round((discount || 0) / months.length);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      for (const month of months) {
server.ts:        const docRef = firestore.collection("fees").doc();
server.ts:        batch.set(docRef, {
server.ts:          student_id,
server.ts:          student_name,
server.ts:          category: 'মাসিক বেতন',
server.ts:          month,
server.ts:          year,
server.ts:          amount: amount_per_month,
server.ts:          paid_amount: paid_amount_per_month,
server.ts:          discount_applied: discount_per_month,
server.ts:          status: 'paid',
server.ts:          paid_date,
server.ts:          transaction_id,
server.ts:          created_at: paid_date
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      await batch.commit();
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error(error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Payment failed" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:  // --- Attendance ---
server.ts:  app.post("/api/attendance", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { student_id, type, timestamp, device_id } = req.body;
server.ts:    // type can be 'check-in' or 'check-out'
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const date = new Date(timestamp).toISOString().split('T')[0];
server.ts:      const time = new Date(timestamp).toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour12: false });
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const attendanceRef = firestore.collection("attendance").doc(`${student_id}_${date}`);
server.ts:      const doc = await attendanceRef.get();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const updateData: any = {
server.ts:        student_id,
server.ts:        date,
server.ts:        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:        device_id
server.ts:      };
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (type === 'check-in') {
server.ts:        updateData.check_in = time;
server.ts:        updateData.status = 'present';
server.ts:      } else {
server.ts:        updateData.check_out = time;
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      await attendanceRef.set(updateData, { merge: true });
server.ts:      
server.ts:      // Get student info for notification
server.ts:      const studentDoc = await firestore.collection("students").doc(student_id).get();
server.ts:      const student = studentDoc.data();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      res.json({ 
server.ts:        success: true, 
server.ts:        message: `${type} recorded for ${student?.name || student_id}`,
server.ts:        studentName: student?.name
server.ts:      });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("Attendance error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to record attendance" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/attendance/class/:className", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { className } = req.params;
server.ts:    const { date } = req.query;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const studentsSnapshot = await firestore.collection("students").where("class", "==", className).where("deleted_at", "==", null).get();
server.ts:      const students = studentsSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as any));
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const attendanceSnapshot = await firestore.collection("attendance").where("date", "==", date).get();
server.ts:      const attendance = attendanceSnapshot.docs.map(doc => doc.data() as any);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const result = students.map((s: any) => ({
server.ts:        ...s,
server.ts:        status: attendance.find((a: any) => a.student_id === s.id)?.status || null
server.ts:      }));
server.ts:      
server.ts:      res.json(result);
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch attendance" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/attendance/bulk", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { date, records } = req.body;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const batch = firestore.batch();
server.ts:      for (const record of records) {
server.ts:        const attendanceSnapshot = await firestore.collection("attendance").where("student_id", "==", record.student_id).where("date", "==", date).get();
server.ts:        attendanceSnapshot.docs.forEach(doc => batch.delete(doc.ref));
server.ts:        
server.ts:        if (record.status) {
server.ts:          const newRef = firestore.collection("attendance").doc();
server.ts:          batch.set(newRef, {
server.ts:            student_id: record.student_id,
server.ts:            date,
server.ts:            status: record.status,
server.ts:            created_at: new Date().toISOString()
server.ts:          });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      await batch.commit();
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error(error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to save attendance" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:

server.ts:      const snapshot = await firestore.collection("attendance").where("student_id", "==", studentId).get();

server.ts:
server.ts:  // --- Device Attendance (ZKTeco K40 Integration) ---
server.ts:  app.post("/api/device/attendance", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { id, type } = req.body; // id: student_id or teacher_id, type: 'student' | 'teacher' | 'guardian'
server.ts:    const now = new Date();
server.ts:    const date = now.toISOString().split('T')[0];
server.ts:    const time = now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour12: false, hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
server.ts:
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      let collectionName = type === 'teacher' ? 'teacher_attendance' : 'attendance';
server.ts:      let idField = type === 'teacher' ? 'teacher_id' : 'student_id';
server.ts:      let docId = `${id}_${date}`;
server.ts:
server.ts:      const docRef = firestore.collection(collectionName).doc(docId);
server.ts:      const doc = await docRef.get();
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (!doc.exists) {
server.ts:        // Check-in
server.ts:        await docRef.set({
server.ts:          [idField]: id,
server.ts:          date,
server.ts:          status: 'present',
server.ts:          check_in: time,
server.ts:          check_out: null,
server.ts:          method: 'device',
server.ts:          updated_at: now.toISOString()
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        res.json({ success: true, action: 'check_in', time });
server.ts:      } else {
server.ts:        // Check-out
server.ts:        await docRef.update({
server.ts:          check_out: time,
server.ts:          updated_at: now.toISOString()
server.ts:        });
server.ts:        res.json({ success: true, action: 'check_out', time });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      // If it's a student, we can also log to a separate history collection for detailed tracking
server.ts:      if (type === 'student' || type === 'guardian') {
server.ts:        await firestore.collection("attendance_history").add({
server.ts:          id,
server.ts:          type,
server.ts:          date,
server.ts:          time,
server.ts:          action: doc.exists ? 'check_out' : 'check_in',
server.ts:          timestamp: now.toISOString()
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("Device attendance error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to record device attendance" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/admin/device-history", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const historySnapshot = await firestore.collection("attendance_history")
server.ts:        .orderBy("timestamp", "desc")
server.ts:        .limit(50)
server.ts:        .get();
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const history = historySnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({
server.ts:        id: doc.id,
server.ts:        ...doc.data()
server.ts:      }));
server.ts:      
server.ts:      res.json(history);
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("Fetch history error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch device history" });
server.ts:    }

server.ts:  // --- Results ---
server.ts:  app.get("/api/admin/results/class/:className", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { className } = req.params;
server.ts:    const { exam_name } = req.query;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const studentsSnapshot = await firestore.collection("students").where("class", "==", className).where("deleted_at", "==", null).get();
server.ts:      const students = studentsSnapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() } as any));
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const resultsSnapshot = await firestore.collection("results").where("exam_name", "==", exam_name).get();
server.ts:      const results = resultsSnapshot.docs.map(doc => doc.data() as any);
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const data = students.map((s: any) => {
server.ts:        const studentResults = results.filter((r: any) => r.student_id === s.id);
server.ts:        const totalMarks = studentResults.reduce((sum: number, r: any) => sum + r.marks, 0);
server.ts:        const avgMarks = studentResults.length > 0 ? totalMarks / studentResults.length : 0;
server.ts:        return {
server.ts:          ...s,
server.ts:          subjects: studentResults,
server.ts:          totalMarks,
server.ts:          avgMarks
server.ts:        };
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      data.sort((a, b) => b.totalMarks - a.totalMarks);
server.ts:      res.json(data);
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch results" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/results", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { student_id, exam_name, subject, marks, grade, date } = req.body;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      await firestore.collection("results").add({
server.ts:        student_id,
server.ts:        exam_name,
server.ts:        subject,
server.ts:        marks: Number(marks),
server.ts:        grade,
server.ts:        date,

server.ts:      });

server.ts:    }
