server.ts:  // --- Parent Login ---
server.ts:  app.post("/api/parent-login", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const identifier = req.body.identifier?.trim();
server.ts:    
server.ts:    if (!identifier) {
server.ts:      return res.status(400).json({ error: "মোবাইল নম্বর, ইমেইল বা স্টুডেন্ট কোড দিন।" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      // Check phone
server.ts:      let snapshot = await firestore.collection("students").where("phone", "==", identifier).where("deleted_at", "==", null).get();
server.ts:      if (snapshot.empty) {
server.ts:        // Check email
server.ts:        snapshot = await firestore.collection("students").where("email", "==", identifier).where("deleted_at", "==", null).get();
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      if (snapshot.empty) {
server.ts:        // Check student_code
server.ts:        snapshot = await firestore.collection("students").where("student_code", "==", identifier).where("deleted_at", "==", null).get();
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (snapshot.empty) {
server.ts:        return res.status(401).json({ error: "মোবাইল নম্বর, ইমেইল বা স্টুডেন্ট কোড সঠিক নয়।" });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      const student = { id: snapshot.docs[0].id, ...snapshot.docs[0].data() };
server.ts:      res.json(student);
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Login failed" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/parent/pay-fee", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { studentId, months, year, amount, method } = req.body;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const settingsDoc = await firestore!.collection("settings").doc("general").get();
server.ts:      const settings = settingsDoc.data() || {};
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const studentDoc = await firestore!.collection("students").doc(studentId).get();
server.ts:      if (!studentDoc.exists) return res.status(404).json({ error: "Student not found" });
server.ts:      const student = studentDoc.data();
server.ts:
server.ts:      // Create a pending transaction
server.ts:      const transactionId = `TXN-${Date.now()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000)}`;
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const pendingPayment = {
server.ts:        transactionId,
server.ts:        studentId,
server.ts:        studentName: student?.name,
server.ts:        studentWhatsapp: student?.whatsapp,
server.ts:        months,
server.ts:        year,
server.ts:        amount,
server.ts:        method,
server.ts:        status: "pending",
server.ts:        createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
server.ts:      };
server.ts:      
server.ts:      await firestore!.collection("pending_payments").doc(transactionId).set(pendingPayment);
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (method === "udyoktapay") {
server.ts:        if (!settings.udyoktapay_api_key || !settings.udyoktapay_api_url) {
server.ts:          return res.status(400).json({ error: "Udyokta Pay is not configured." });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        const payload = {
server.ts:          full_name: student?.name || "Student",
server.ts:          email: student?.email || "student@example.com",
server.ts:          amount: amount,
server.ts:          metadata: {
server.ts:            transactionId
server.ts:          },
server.ts:          redirect_url: `${req.protocol}://${req.get('host')}/parent?payment=success`,
server.ts:          cancel_url: `${req.protocol}://${req.get('host')}/parent?payment=cancel`,
server.ts:          webhook_url: `${req.protocol}://${req.get('host')}/api/udyoktapay/webhook`
server.ts:        };
server.ts:
server.ts:        const response = await fetch(settings.udyoktapay_api_url, {
server.ts:          method: "POST",
server.ts:          headers: {
server.ts:            "RT-UDYOKTAPAY-API-KEY": settings.udyoktapay_api_key,
server.ts:            "Content-Type": "application/json"
server.ts:          },
server.ts:          body: JSON.stringify(payload)
server.ts:        });
server.ts:
server.ts:        const data = await response.json();
server.ts:        if (data.status && data.payment_url) {
server.ts:          return res.json({ payment_url: data.payment_url });
server.ts:        } else {
server.ts:          return res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to initiate payment with Udyokta Pay." });
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      } else {
server.ts:        // Manual payment (bKash/Nagad/Rocket personal number)
server.ts:        return res.json({ success: true, transactionId, message: "Please send money and provide TrxID." });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error(error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Payment initiation failed" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/udyoktapay/webhook", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { status, metadata, amount } = req.body;
server.ts:    
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const apiKeyHeader = req.headers['rt-udyoktapay-api-key'];
server.ts:      const settingsDoc = await firestore!.collection("settings").doc("general").get();
server.ts:      const settings = settingsDoc.data() || {};
server.ts:      
server.ts:      if (apiKeyHeader !== settings.udyoktapay_api_key) {
server.ts:        return res.status(401).send("Unauthorized");
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      if (status === "COMPLETED" && metadata?.transactionId) {
server.ts:        const txDoc = await firestore!.collection("pending_payments").doc(metadata.transactionId).get();
server.ts:        if (txDoc.exists) {
server.ts:          const txData = txDoc.data();
server.ts:          if (txData?.status === "pending") {
server.ts:            // Mark as paid
server.ts:            await firestore!.collection("pending_payments").doc(metadata.transactionId).update({ status: "completed" });
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Create fee records
server.ts:            const receiptNumber = `REC-${Date.now()}`;
server.ts:            for (const month of txData.months) {
server.ts:              const feeData = {
server.ts:                student_id: txData.studentId,
server.ts:                student_name: txData.studentName,
server.ts:                amount: txData.amount / txData.months.length,
server.ts:                month: month,
server.ts:                year: txData.year,
server.ts:                status: "paid",
server.ts:                paid_date: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:                receipt_number: receiptNumber,
server.ts:                payment_method: "Udyokta Pay"
server.ts:              };
server.ts:              await firestore!.collection("fees").add(feeData);
server.ts:            }
server.ts:            
server.ts:            // Add to transactions
server.ts:            await firestore!.collection("transactions").add({
server.ts:              type: "income",
server.ts:              category: "Monthly Fee",
server.ts:              amount: txData.amount,
server.ts:              date: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:              description: `Monthly Fee for ${txData.months.join(", ")} ${txData.year} - ${txData.studentName}`,
server.ts:              receipt_number: receiptNumber,
server.ts:              payment_method: "Udyokta Pay"
server.ts:            });
server.ts:          }
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      res.send("OK");
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      console.error("Webhook error:", error);
server.ts:      res.status(500).send("Error");
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.get("/api/admin/pending-payments", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const snapshot = await firestore!.collection("pending_payments").where("status", "==", "pending").get();
server.ts:      const payments = snapshot.docs.map(doc => ({ id: doc.id, ...doc.data() }));
server.ts:      res.json(payments);
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch pending payments" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });
server.ts:
server.ts:  app.post("/api/admin/pending-payments/:id/approve", async (req, res) => {
server.ts:    const { id } = req.params;
server.ts:    try {
server.ts:      const txDoc = await firestore!.collection("pending_payments").doc(id).get();
server.ts:      if (!txDoc.exists) return res.status(404).json({ error: "Transaction not found" });
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const txData = txDoc.data();
server.ts:      await firestore!.collection("pending_payments").doc(id).update({ status: "completed" });
server.ts:      
server.ts:      const receiptNumber = `REC-${Date.now()}`;
server.ts:      for (const month of txData?.months) {
server.ts:        await firestore!.collection("fees").add({
server.ts:          student_id: txData?.studentId,
server.ts:          student_name: txData?.studentName,
server.ts:          amount: txData?.amount / txData?.months.length,
server.ts:          month: month,
server.ts:          year: txData?.year,
server.ts:          status: "paid",
server.ts:          paid_date: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:          receipt_number: receiptNumber,
server.ts:          payment_method: txData?.method
server.ts:        });
server.ts:      }
server.ts:      
server.ts:      await firestore!.collection("transactions").add({
server.ts:        type: "income",
server.ts:        category: "Monthly Fee",
server.ts:        amount: txData?.amount,
server.ts:        date: new Date().toISOString(),
server.ts:        description: `Monthly Fee for ${txData?.months.join(", ")} ${txData?.year} - ${txData?.studentName}`,
server.ts:        receipt_number: receiptNumber,
server.ts:        payment_method: txData?.method
server.ts:      });
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {
server.ts:      res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to approve payment" });
server.ts:    }
server.ts:  });

server.ts:    try {

server.ts:        "students", "exams", "fees", "attendance", "results", "hifz_records",
server.ts:        "subjects", "notices", "donations", "expenses", "income", "teacher_attendance",
server.ts:        "admissions", "teacher_salaries", "fee_setups", "job_applications", "delete_history"
server.ts:      ];
server.ts:
server.ts:      for (const collectionName of collectionsToClear) {
server.ts:        const snapshot = await firestore.collection(collectionName).get();
server.ts:        if (snapshot.empty) continue;
server.ts:        
server.ts:        const chunks = [];
server.ts:        for (let i = 0; i < snapshot.docs.length; i += 250) {
server.ts:          chunks.push(snapshot.docs.slice(i, i + 250));
server.ts:        }
server.ts:
server.ts:        for (const chunk of chunks) {
server.ts:          const batch = firestore.batch();
server.ts:          chunk.forEach(doc => {
server.ts:            // Copy to trash
server.ts:            const trashRef = firestore.collection(`trash_${collectionName}`).doc(doc.id);
server.ts:            batch.set(trashRef, doc.data());
server.ts:            // Delete from original
server.ts:            batch.delete(doc.ref);
server.ts:          });
server.ts:          await batch.commit();
server.ts:        }
server.ts:      }
server.ts:
server.ts:      res.json({ success: true });
server.ts:    } catch (error) {

repair_db.js:
repair_db.js:try {
repair_db.js:  console.log("Attempting to repair database...");
repair_db.js:  if (fs.existsSync("madrasa.db")) {
repair_db.js:    // Try to open it to confirm corruption
repair_db.js:    const db = new Database("madrasa.db");
repair_db.js:    console.log("Database opened successfully. It might not be corrupted.");
repair_db.js:    db.close();
repair_db.js:  } else {
repair_db.js:    console.log("Database file not found.");
repair_db.js:  }
repair_db.js:} catch (e) {
repair_db.js:  console.log("Database is corrupted, attempting repair...");
repair_db.js:  // SQLite repair usually involves dumping and restoring
repair_db.js:  // Since we can't easily run sqlite3 CLI, we'll try to rename and create a new one
repair_db.js:  // and hope the app handles it or we can recover from trash.
repair_db.js:  fs.renameSync("madrasa.db", "madrasa_corrupted.db");
repair_db.js:  console.log("Corrupted database renamed to madrasa_corrupted.db");
repair_db.js:  
repair_db.js:  // Try to restore from trash if exists
repair_db.js:  if (fs.existsSync("madrasa_trash.db")) {
repair_db.js:    fs.copyFileSync("madrasa_trash.db", "madrasa.db");
repair_db.js:    console.log("Restored from madrasa_trash.db");
repair_db.js:  } else {
repair_db.js:    console.log("No trash database found to restore from.");
repair_db.js:  }

index.html:    <script>
index.html:      // Aggressively silence Vite WebSocket errors
index.html:      (function() {
index.html:        const OriginalWebSocket = window.WebSocket;
index.html:        window.WebSocket = function(url, protocols) {
index.html:          if (typeof url === 'string' && (url.includes('vite') || url.includes('hmr'))) {
index.html:            // Return a dummy object that mimics a closed WebSocket
index.html:            return {
index.html:              addEventListener: () => {},
index.html:              removeEventListener: () => {},
index.html:              send: () => {},
index.html:              close: () => {},
index.html:              readyState: 3, // CLOSED
index.html:              onopen: null,
index.html:              onclose: null,
index.html:              onerror: null,
index.html:              onmessage: null,
index.html:            };
index.html:          }
index.html:          try {
index.html:            return new OriginalWebSocket(url, protocols);
index.html:          } catch (e) {
index.html:            return {
index.html:              addEventListener: () => {},
index.html:              removeEventListener: () => {},
index.html:              send: () => {},
index.html:              close: () => {},
index.html:              readyState: 3,
index.html:            };
index.html:          }
index.html:        };
index.html:        window.WebSocket.prototype = OriginalWebSocket.prototype;
index.html:      })();
index.html:
index.html:      // Silence unhandled rejections related to WebSockets
index.html:      window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', function(event) {
index.html:        const reason = event.reason;
index.html:        if (reason && (
index.html:          (reason.message && reason.message.includes('WebSocket')) ||
index.html:          (typeof reason === 'string' && reason.includes('WebSocket')) ||
index.html:          (reason.name === 'Error' && reason.message === 'WebSocket closed without opened')
index.html:        )) {
index.html:          event.preventDefault();
index.html:          event.stopPropagation();
index.html:        }
index.html:      }, true);
index.html:
index.html:      // Silence console errors and warnings related to Vite/WebSocket
index.html:      const silencePatterns = [
index.html:        '[vite] failed to connect to websocket',
index.html:        'WebSocket closed without opened',
index.html:        'WebSocket connection failed',
index.html:        'hmr'
index.html:      ];
index.html:
index.html:      const originalError = console.error;
index.html:      console.error = (...args) => {
index.html:        if (args[0] && typeof args[0] === 'string' && silencePatterns.some(p => args[0].toLowerCase().includes(p.toLowerCase()))) {
index.html:          return;
index.html:        }
index.html:        originalError.apply(console, args);
index.html:      };
index.html:
index.html:      const originalWarn = console.warn;
index.html:      console.warn = (...args) => {
index.html:        if (args[0] && typeof args[0] === 'string' && silencePatterns.some(p => args[0].toLowerCase().includes(p.toLowerCase()))) {
index.html:          return;
index.html:        }
index.html:        originalWarn.apply(console, args);
index.html:      };
index.html:    </script>
